lcQuery = [Select a.* From SigCdUsu a ]+;
		  [Where Not a.cAtivos='N' And not a.Senhas = ']+Space(6)+[']

If (ThisForm.poDataMgr.SqlExecute(lcQuery, 'TmpUsu') < 1)
	=MessageBox('Favor Reinicializar o Processo!!!', 16, 'Falha na Conexăo (TmpUsu)')
	Return 0
EndIf
